title: MGP Backend Capabilities
description: Explicit capability declaration for an MGP adapter or backend.

supports_write.description: Whether the backend can create new memory objects.

supports_update.description: Whether the backend can mutate existing memory objects.

supports_delete.description: Whether the backend supports destructive deletion behavior.

supports_purge.description: Whether the backend supports hard purge semantics.

supports_search.description: Whether the backend supports search-style retrieval.

supports_native_ttl.description: Whether the backend supports native expiration or TTL semantics.

supports_graph_relations.description: Whether the backend can represent graph-like relations directly.

supports_checkpoint_pointer.description: Whether the backend can store or serve checkpoint pointer memory types natively.

supports_lineage_native.description: Whether lineage links are represented natively by the backend.

supports_partial_redaction.description: Whether the backend can natively return partially redacted content.

supports_conflict_detection_native.description: Whether the backend can detect memory conflicts natively.

supports_dedupe_native.description: Whether the backend can deduplicate semantically equivalent memories natively.

supports_merge_native.description: Whether the backend can merge or reinforce memories natively.

supports_retrieval_explanations.description: Whether the backend can explain why a result was retrieved.

supports_prompt_view.description: Whether the backend can natively provide a prompt-safe or consumable view.

search_modes.description: Retrieval modes exposed by the backend.

score_kind.description: How search scores should be interpreted across results.
